recommendations.title: Emanuelle and the Last Cannibals
recommendations.overview: Intrepid photographer Emanuelle is taken deep into the Amazonian jungle to search for a cannibalistic tribe long believed to be extinct.

recommendations.title: Absurd
recommendations.overview: A priest-doctor chasing a man with supernatural regenerative abilities, who has recently escaped from a medical lab, reaches a small town where the mutant goes on a killing spree.

recommendations.title: Anthropophagous
recommendations.overview: Tourists take a boat to a remote island, where they find that most of the people have disappeared, and something is stalking them. They find a hidden room in the big mansion on a hill, and an ancient diary, which gives them clues to the source of the

recommendations.title: S.O.S.: Women to the Sea
recommendations.overview: Recently divorced Adriana tries to get revenge on the woman who took her husband away from her by going on a European cruze along with them.

recommendations.title: S.O.S.: Women to the Sea 2
recommendations.overview: Afraid her husband will fall back with his ex girlfriend after they're assigned to work together, Adriana and her sister set sail to the U.S. to go after him to stop this from happening.

recommendations.title: Of Mice and Men
recommendations.overview: Two drifters, one a gentle but slow giant, try to make money working the fields during the Depression so they can fulfill their dreams.

recommendations.title: Double Dad
recommendations.overview: While her mom is away, a teen sneaks out of the hippie commune where she lives and embarks on a life-changing adventure to discover who her father is.

recommendations.title: Someone Borrowed
recommendations.overview: To fulfill his mother’s dying wish and avoid being removed from her will, an inflexible bachelor hires an actress to play his fiancée.

recommendations.title: It's a Fairy!
recommendations.overview: Geraldine is a fairy who lost their wings by using unconventional methods in their missions. Her last chance to retrieve them will be the mission "Julia".
